lyrics.text: You probably think that you are better now, better now
lyrics.translation: 你大概觉得你现在变成更好的人了吧

lyrics.text: You only say that 'cause I'm not around, not around
lyrics.translation: 你还说这是因为我不在你身边

lyrics.text: You know I never meant to let you down, let you down
lyrics.translation: 你知道我从未想过让你失望

lyrics.text: Woulda gave you anything, woulda gave you everything
lyrics.translation: 会给你一切的，会给你一切的

lyrics.text: I did not believe that it would end, no
lyrics.translation: 我不相信它会结束，不

lyrics.text: Everything came second to the Benzo oh
lyrics.translation: 所有的一切都不如一辆奔驰

lyrics.text: You're not even speaking to my friends, no
lyrics.translation: 你甚至连我的朋友都不再理会了

lyrics.text: You knew all my uncles and my aunts though
lyrics.translation: 尽管你对我的家人已经如此熟悉了

lyrics.text: Twenty candles, blow 'em out and open your eyes
lyrics.translation: 二十根蜡烛，吹灭它们睁开你的眼睛吧

lyrics.text: We were looking forward to the rest of our lives
lyrics.translation: 我们都在期待着余生

lyrics.text: Used to keep my picture posted by your bedside
lyrics.translation: 曾经我的照片伴你枕边

lyrics.text: But now it's in your dresser with the socks you don't like
lyrics.translation: 现在它们被你弃如敝履

lyrics.text: And I'm rollin', rollin', rollin', rollin'
lyrics.translation: 我不断的打拼着

lyrics.text: With my brothers like it's Jonas, Jonas
lyrics.translation: 和我的兄弟一块就像Jonas兄弟们

lyrics.text: Drinkin' Henny and I'm tryna forget
lyrics.translation: 喝着轩尼诗，我仍在尝试忘记

lyrics.text: But I can't get this shit outta my head
lyrics.translation: 可我忘不掉你

lyrics.text: You probably think that you are better now, better now
lyrics.translation: 你大概觉得你现在变成更好的人了吧

lyrics.text: You only say that 'cause I'm not around, not around
lyrics.translation: 你还说着是因为我不在你身边

lyrics.text: You know I never meant to let you down, let you down
lyrics.translation: 你知道我从未想过让你失望

lyrics.text: Woulda gave you anything, woulda gave you everything
lyrics.translation: 会给你一切的，会给你一切的

lyrics.text: Whoa oh
lyrics.translation: 噢

lyrics.text: better now, better now,yeah
lyrics.translation: 更好的人

lyrics.text: i'm b-b-b-b-better now,better now,yeah
lyrics.translation: 我已成为更好的人

lyrics.text: i'm b-b-b-b-better now,better now,yeah
lyrics.translation: 成为更好的人

lyrics.text: i'm b-b-b-b-better now, better now
lyrics.translation: 成为更好的人

lyrics.text: better now, better now,yeah
lyrics.translation: 更好的人

lyrics.text: i'm b-b-b-b-better now,better now,yeah
lyrics.translation: 我已经变更好

lyrics.text: i'm b-b-b-b-better now,better now,yeah
lyrics.translation: 我现在已经变更好

lyrics.text: i'm b-b-b-b-better now,better now
lyrics.translation: 成为了更好的人
